hooks.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; printf '{"systemMessage":"Reminder: update the Current Status section in CLAUDE.md to reflect this session work, then commit and push."}'
